name: Dan Dan Mein (Noodles with Hot Meat Sauce)
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 tsp Horse bean sauce with chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles in boiling water for about 6 minutes, then rinse and drain. Place on a serving platter.
2. Lightly blanch bean sprouts and arrange around the noodles; set aside.
3. In a wok, heat oil and brown the beef. Add garlic, ginger, and horse bean sauce; stir-fry for 1 minute.
4. Add chicken broth, sherry, and soy sauce to the wok. Lower the heat to medium and cook until the liquid is reduced by half.
5. Stir in chopped green onions.
6. Combine cornstarch with water in a separate bowl. Stir this mixture into the hot sauce.
7. Cook until the sauce thickens. Pour over the noodles.
8. Garnish with Chinese parsley. Makes 4 servings.
